name: Combustible Gas + Hot Work + Low Ventilation
description: Detects high ignition risk when combustible gas levels rise above 15% LEL while a active HOT WORK permit is running in the same zone with ventilation efficiency below 75%.

name: Confined Space Entry + Oxygen Deficiency
description: Triggers alert if workers enter a zone with an active CONFINED SPACE permit while local oxygen content falls below 19.5%.

name: High Vibration + High Pressure + Overdue Maintenance
description: Flags potential mechanical burst if compressor vibration exceeds 4.0 mm/s, pressure exceeds 150 psi, and maintenance schedule is overdue.
